title: What to Know About Iran’s Pickaxe Mountain
summary_full: The fortified underground complex, in central Iran, is about one mile away from the Natanz uranium enrichment facility.
summary_public: The fortified underground complex, in central Iran, is about one mile away from the Natanz uranium enrichment facility.
